# Chatter on bank statements

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:df1680f26f8d995d55af2fb5265fb7f1c3b464cbc6ecfcd2476b6ad058468b92

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds the chatter on the bank statements for managing attachments
and communications in this document.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. Go to *Invocing > Configuration > Accounting > Journals*.
2. Select one bank or cash journal and click on *Action > Bank statements*.
3. Select then one bank statement.
4. You will see there the chatter.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-financial-tools/issues).
